title: Rework hack/make*, and switch from golint to golangci-lint
body:
Motivated by #1965 , finally fix #1892 .

Also take the opportunity to simplify all the validation scripts, by removing dead code, or no-longer-necessary options, and the like.

(https://golangci-lint.run/usage/install/ recommends using a GitHub action; I went with what I was already familiar with, consistent with what is used during local development, just to make sure that this gets done; we can improve on this later.)

Cc: @cevich @edsantiago , I might well be overlooking something about the CI pipeline or system tests.

See individual commit messages for details.

comments.body: (This is expected to fail without #1965 ; I’d like to see that at least once, then I’ll rebase or something.)

> https://golangci-lint.run/usage/install/ recommends using a GitHub action

BTW, it's good you did this with scripts.  Github-actions aren't portable to local development and coordinating workflow dependencies w/ other CI systems (i.e. cirrus-ci) is a major PITA.

Looks like a rebase may be needed.  
LGTM
